title: Alien Evolution
description: A Ben 10 mod for Palladium! Transform into a variety of high quality aliens with unique moves and playstyles!
body:
![Alien Evo Animated Banner, with an RGB Cannonbolt floating admist green bubbles.](https://i.imgur.com/RPCeIcy.gif)

Alien Evolution is a Palladium-based Ben 10 mod for Minecraft 1.20.1.

Our goal is to respect the vision of the Ben 10 franchise and its community. All aspects of this mod are created to be faithful and accurate, yet balanced and integrated to expand Minecraft's progression system. Expect updates adding new features, aliens, and omnitrices as we continue development on this project.
Join our discord server! Become a part of the community and view teasers, ask questions, and suggest features!
If you would like to support our team and get early access to sneak peaks, development builds, and priority suggestions, feel free to support us on Patreon! [https://www.patreon.com/cw/alienevo](https://www.patreon.com/cw/alienevo)
![Alien Evo Text Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caef2c7d799ea960cb24320ab7863c4dbd5a167c.png)

Features:

* Craft the Prototype Omnitrix and wield the ability to transform into 11 unique aliens with carefully crafted movesets and abilities! * View the stats and descriptions of your aliens through a special power screen! Track your progress, level up your aliens, and purchase new abilities as you gain experience. * Upgrade your omnitrix by mastering alien skill trees, unlocking new watch functions like _**quick change, decouple,**_ and _**codes**_! * Edit every individual color of your aliens with an easy-to-use interface for endless combinations! Or, place your Omnitrix on the Omnitrix Workbench to customize the colors of its individual parts! * Trade with Galvan villagers for ancient relics that will lead you to rare, dangerous structures containing Code Tablets for _**Self Destruct**_ and _**Master Control.**_ ![Alien Evo Text Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caef2c7d799ea960cb24320ab7863c4dbd5a167c.png) Requirements:
Palladium, Geckolib, KubeJS, Rhino, Architectury API, Pehkui

![Alien Evo Text Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caef2c7d799ea960cb24320ab7863c4dbd5a167c.png)

Commands:

/mastercontrol (player name) /alienautoadd (alien\_id) /alienevoplaylist (player name) (playlist #) (slot #) (alien\_id) /maxaliens (player name) ![Alien Evo Text Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caef2c7d799ea960cb24320ab7863c4dbd5a167c.png) ![Examples of Evo's customization system. A green Diamondhead, blue Fourarms, red XLR8, blue Cannonbolt, and blue Heatblast.](https://i.imgur.com/5fCZLe9.jpeg) ![Evo's leveling screen. A preview of a purple customized Petrosapien on the left, a skill tree with purchasable abilities in the center, and color sliders for customization on the right.](https://i.imgur.com/74y4iiC.png) ![Alien Evo Text Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caef2c7d799ea960cb24320ab7863c4dbd5a167c.png)
